UNITED STATES SECURITIES AND EXCHANGE COMMISSION
FORM 8-K

Trading Symbol: HYPO
Title of each class: Common Stock, $0.001 par value per share
Name of each exchange on which registered: The NASDAQ Global Select Market

Item 1.01 Entry into a Material Definitive Agreement.

On October 15, 2025, Hypothetical Inc. (the "Company") entered into a
Strategic Partnership Agreement with NVIDIA Corporation ("NVIDIA"), pursuant
to which NVIDIA will make a strategic investment of $500 million in the
Company through the purchase of common stock at a price of $45.00 per share.

In addition, NVIDIA and the Company entered into a Joint Development
Agreement to collaborate on next-generation AI infrastructure solutions
and a Master Supply Agreement for NVIDIA Blackwell GPUs.

Item 3.02 Unregistered Sales of Equity Securities.

The shares were sold in a private placement to NVIDIA Corporation pursuant
to the exemption from registration provided by Section 4(a)(2) of the
Securities Act of 1933.

Item 9.01 Financial Statements and Exhibits.

99.1 Press Release
